Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ConversationVendorInfo

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ConversationVendorInfo
public class ConversationVendorInfo extends Metadata

Java class for ConversationVendorInfo complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConversationVendorInfo">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="agentSSOSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsAccountKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsRootEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsTenantVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="bridgeComponent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="clientAuthMode" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ClientAuthMode" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="connectorUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customConfig" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customLoginUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="developerName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="einsteinConversationInsightsSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="integrationClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="integrationClassName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTaxCompliant" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="keyProvisioningSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="namedCredential" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="namedCredentialSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="partnerContactCenterListSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="partnerPhoneNumbersSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="partnerTransferDestinationsSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="queueManagementSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="serverAuthMode" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ServerAuthMode" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="telephonySettingsComponent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="universalCallRecordingAccessSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userSyncingSupported" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="vendorType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationVendorType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
